# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-operator
spec:
  components:
    sidecarInjector:
      enabled: true
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
        enableCoreDump: true
        accessLogFile: "/dev/stdout"
        logLevel: "debug"
        statsd:
          enabled: true
      enableTracing: true
      meshID: "mesh"
  addonComponents:
    prometheus:
      enabled: true
  meshConfig:
    accessLogFile: "/dev/stdout"
    outboundTrafficPolicy:
      mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
    proxyMetadata:
      PROXY_ADMIN_PORT: "15000"
    enableTracing: true
    serviceDiscovery: "dns"
    envoyAccessLogService:
      enabled: true
      address: "envoy-access-log-service:5000"
      port: 5000
    configDump:
      enabled: true
    stats:
      enabled: true
    clusters:
      enabled: true
